steps.title: Translate costs into mathematical expressions
steps.content: The cereal costs a fixed 2 dollars. Strawberries cost 1.90 dollars per pound, so p pounds cost $1.90p$. The total paid is 9.60 dollars.

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost is the sum of the cereal and strawberries:
$$2 + 1.90p = 9.60$$
Rearranging: $1.90p + 2 = 9.60$. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
